name: AVAYA HLDGS CORP. DL-,001
summary: Avaya Holdings Corp. is a global provider of communication and collaboration solutions, offering cloud-based and on-premises software and services. The company's portfolio includes unified communications, contact center solutions, and networking products, serving businesses of all sizes. TICKER: Avaya Holdings Corp. provides communication and collaboration solutions, offering cloud-based and on-premises software and services including unified communications and contact center solutions.
